items.title: 效率感知的在线 Agent RL:长度奖励设计与成功率-长度帕累托
items.pitch: 在 SFT 冷启动 + GRPO 在线 RL 的成熟管线上,系统研究"不掉成功率压 token/步数"的奖励设计:对比绝对长度惩罚、成功轨迹组内相对比较、预算条件化三种设计的帕累托曲线与 hack 模式,先在 GSM8K 验证、再迁移到多步 agent 环境(轨迹更长、奖励更稀疏,简洁性问题被放大)。
items.why: 范式主干已成熟(整体主张=复现),但效率感知缝隙远未收敛,agent 场景尤其空(Dispatch 25 文献扫描)。研究目标与系统成本罕见同向:短轨迹直接省 rollout(D02 的 70%+ wall-clock),在 NPU 算力受限语境下双重收益。D22 的 compact filtering 与 D08 的"reward 升+长度骤降"监控信号是看板内的先行证据。工程门槛适中:2-4 张 A100/H100 或昇腾单节点即可全流程。
steps: 1-2 周:verl + GSM8K + Qwen2.5-1.5B 复现 SFT→GRPO 基线,指标对齐公开数字,摸熟 rollout/奖励/权重同步管线
2-4 周:注入长度奖励变量(绝对惩罚 vs 组内相对 vs 预算条件化),画成功率-长度帕累托,监控 reward 与长度双曲线防 hack
带着实验困惑精读:InstructGPT→R1→DeepSeekMath GRPO→efficient reasoning RL/overthinking 近作→AReaL
迁移到多步 agent 环境(tau-bench 或代码沙箱),验证结论保持性——简洁性被放大处往往有新东西
可选延伸:落到昇腾单节点(对照 Dispatch 13 方案),效率奖励与 rollout 成本联动做系统侧测量
items.minimumExperiment: 单卡 80G:Qwen2.5-1.5B 在 GSM8K 上 SFT→GRPO 跑通,加组内相对长度项,与无长度项基线比较成功率与平均 token 数两条曲线
items.successMetric: 成功率持平(±1pt)前提下平均 token 降 30%+,且训练全程无 reward 升+长度骤降的 hack 信号;结论迁移到 agent 环境后保持方向一致

items.title: GRPO-on-Ascend Benchmark & Accuracy-Alignment Suite
items.pitch: Build a reproducible benchmark that runs GRPO/DAPO on identical models across Ascend (910B) and NVIDIA, reporting throughput, MFU, memory, and — critically — reward/loss-curve divergence. Turn the scattered numbers in verl discussion #900 into a living, automated dashboard.
items.why: Everyone porting RL to Ascend hits accuracy drift (DAPO reward MAE ~3.7–4.3% vs GRPO ~0.3–3.3%) and nobody has a clean cross-platform baseline. Dispatch 23 显示训推一致在 GPU 侧已收敛出三层标准解法(监控/算法补偿/根治),问题本身不再新,但『异构(NPU vs GPU)一致性』被 D23 明确圈为空白——这个 benchmark 是那块空白的测量仪。novelty 因 GPU 侧进展下调,价值反而更聚焦:高价值、低算力、绝佳的全栈入门项目。
steps: Get verl running on a single Atlas 800T A2 node (8x 910B) with vLLM-Ascend
Run GRPO on Qwen2.5-0.5B/7B on GSM8K/MATH; log throughput, MFU, peak HBM
Mirror the exact run on an NVIDIA node; diff reward curves and final accuracy
Bisect divergence to operators (npu_fusion_attention, RNG, accumulation) and publish a porting/accuracy checklist
items.minimumExperiment: Run GRPO on Qwen2.5-0.5B / GSM8K for 200 steps on one Atlas 800T A2 (910B) node and one A100 node; log reward curve + peak HBM.
items.successMetric: Cross-platform reward-curve MAE quantified (<5%) with a reproducible throughput / MFU / peak-HBM table for ≥1 model.

items.title: Sleep-Mode / Colocated Hybrid Engine for RL on Ascend
items.pitch: Implement (or emulate) vLLM 'sleep mode' on Ascend so the actor and rollout engine can share NPUs, unlocking the memory-efficient colocated hybrid engine that GPU RL relies on.
items.why: Dispatch 13 把『无 sleep-mode』列为昇腾四大坑之首,至今仍是 colocated 路线的最后一块短板:vLLM-Ascend v0.22.1rc1 已用 HCCL 权重传输后端打通了相邻的训推权重同步环节,权重能流动了,但显存仍不能让渡。补上 sleep-mode 等价物后,昇腾的 colocated hybrid engine 才算闭环——这是 verl / OpenRLHF / slime 整个开源生态都需要的系统贡献。
steps: Profile NPU memory during a colocated GRPO step; quantify what sleep mode would free
Study vLLM's CUDA sleep-mode implementation and map it to CANN/torch_npu memory APIs
Prototype KV/weight offload-reload between rollout and training phases on Ascend
Upstream to vLLM-Ascend and validate a 7B→32B colocated GRPO run on one node
items.minimumExperiment: Profile NPU memory across one colocated GRPO step on a 7B model and prototype KV/weight offload-reload between rollout and train phases.
items.successMetric: Colocated 7B GRPO runs on a single node with ≥30% lower peak HBM vs no offload, at no accuracy loss.

items.title: Asynchronous Off-Policy RL Tuned for NPU Constraints
items.pitch: Adapt an async/off-policy recipe (AReaL-style decoupling + ExGRPO experience replay) specifically to Ascend, where the missing hybrid engine makes synchronous colocated RL inefficient. 地基已现:vLLM-Ascend v0.22.1rc1 的 HCCL 权重传输后端解决了『权重怎么送』,这条 idea 升级为在其上做『算法配方怎么调』——staleness 容忍度、优先回放与 NPU 内存约束的联合调优。
items.why: Async RL sidesteps the exact bottleneck Ascend suffers from。生态进展显著:Dispatch 18(prime-rl / SkyRL-Agent)、Dispatch 19(slime fully_async)和 Dispatch 23 的结论都表明异步解耦已收敛为行业标准答案,AReaL 2.0 还把权重更新拆成了独立微服务——novelty 相应下调。但『在 NPU 约束下的 off-policy 算法配方』(staleness × 优先回放 × 固定 HBM 的 Pareto 前沿)仍无人给出,且 HCCL 后端打通后此事第一次真正可做。
steps: Stand up AReaL 2.0's decoupled pipeline on Ascend, swapping its CUDA-IPC weight path for the vLLM-Ascend HCCL transfer backend
Add prioritized experience replay (ExGRPO-style) keyed on rollout correctness/entropy
Measure staleness tolerance and speedup vs synchronous verl-Ascend
Characterize the accuracy/throughput Pareto frontier under fixed NPU memory
items.minimumExperiment: Run AReaL's async pipeline on Ascend with the HCCL weight-transfer backend for a 1.5–7B GRPO run.
items.successMetric: Throughput speedup vs synchronous verl-Ascend at equal final accuracy, with a documented staleness tolerance.

items.title: FP8 RL Training on Ascend
items.pitch: Bring DeepSeek-V3-style fine-grained FP8 (tile/block-wise scaling) into the RL loop on Ascend — not just pretraining — to halve memory for actor/critic and rollouts under tight HBM.
items.why: FP8 is the most direct lever against the NPU memory wall。生态进展:GPU 侧 FP8 RL 已被 Miles 的端到端 FP8(Dispatch 09)和 prime-rl 的 FP8 vLLM rollout(Dispatch 18)证明可行,不再是无人区——novelty 略降。但昇腾侧恰好迎来窗口:Ascend 950 原生 FP8/MXFP4(Dispatch 03),vLLM-Ascend v0.22.1rc1 已扩展 950 的 W8A8/W4A8 动态量化。『FP8 RL on NPU』是把已验证的 GPU 配方抢先搬进新硬件原生支持里,时机敏感。
steps: Confirm Ascend FP8 GEMM support and numerical behavior for forward/backward (910B fallback vs 950 native paths)
Apply fine-grained tile/block scaling to the policy model in a GRPO run
Handle the stability landmines (entropy collapse + FP8 noise interaction)
Compare convergence and memory vs BF16 GRPO on Ascend
items.minimumExperiment: Confirm Ascend FP8 GEMM forward/backward numerics, then run one FP8-policy GRPO step on Qwen2.5-0.5B.
items.successMetric: FP8 GRPO matches BF16 reward within 1–2% at ≥30% memory reduction, stable over 200 steps.

items.title: Single-Node R1-Zero Reproduction Cookbook on Ascend
items.pitch: Produce a clean, fully-documented recipe + repo that reproduces R1-Zero-style emergent reasoning with a small model (1.5B–7B) on a single Atlas A2 node — the 'getting started' guide the Ascend RL community lacks.
items.why: R1-Zero recipes exist on Ascend but are scattered and brittle; a polished, reproducible cookbook has outsized community impact and is very achievable。新弹药:openPangu 2.0 开源了昇腾第一手的后训练代码与训推算子(Dispatch 20),cookbook 里的踩坑指南可以直接对照官方实现校验,而不再全靠自己摸;Dispatch 13 的四坑清单则给了『pitfall 章节』的现成骨架。Leverages 1-shot/spurious-rewards findings to keep data and compute tiny.
steps: Pick Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B and a verifiable math reward (GSM8K/MATH)
Run GRPO via verl-Ascend or TRL-Ascend; capture the emergent long-CoT transition
Cross-check each pitfall + fix against openPangu's open post-training code; test data-efficiency (1-shot RLVR)
Release a one-command repo + write-up with reward curves and ablations
items.minimumExperiment: Run GRPO on Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B / GSM8K via verl-Ascend on one A2 node and capture the long-CoT transition.
items.successMetric: A one-command repo lets a fresh user reproduce the emergent-reasoning reward curve on a single node.

items.title: Entropy-Collapse Mitigation in verl-Ascend
items.pitch: Implement Clip-Cov / KL-Cov (the entropy-mechanism fixes) inside verl's Ascend path and study whether NPU numerical noise changes the entropy-collapse dynamics seen on GPUs.
items.why: Entropy collapse caps RL reasoning gains。生态进展:Dispatch 22 的 DeepSWE/GRPO++ 用 compact filtering + entropy-free 训练在生产级跑通了另一条防崩路线,Dispatch 23 更给出四种崩法的分类学与已收敛防御——『防熵崩』本身不再新,novelty 下调。仍然独有的部分是硬件问题:昇腾的精度差异(累加序、融合算子)如何与熵动力学交互,GPU 文献完全没有覆盖,是小而干净的可发表贡献。
steps: Reproduce entropy collapse on a GRPO reasoning run on Ascend
Implement Clip-Cov/KL-Cov token-level interventions; compare against a GRPO++-style entropy-free baseline
Compare entropy/accuracy trajectories Ascend vs GPU to isolate hardware effects
Report whether NPU accumulation noise accelerates or masks collapse
items.minimumExperiment: Reproduce entropy collapse on a GRPO reasoning run on Ascend, then add Clip-Cov / KL-Cov token-level interventions.
items.successMetric: Mitigation keeps entropy above the collapsed baseline and improves final accuracy; Ascend-vs-GPU dynamics isolated.

items.title: Memory-Lean Long-Context RL via Hybrid-Sparse Attention + KV Compression on NPU
items.pitch: Combine hybrid/sparse attention (MLA, DSA:SWA, SWA×全局) with chunk-wise KV compression to make long-CoT and agentic RL feasible on memory-constrained NPUs, where the KV cache dominates rollout memory. 地基已现:openPangu Flash 就是 910B 原生训练的 MLA+DSA:SWA 1:2 / 512K 模型——idea 升级为『在它之上做长上下文 RL』,而非自己攒模型。
items.why: Long reasoning chains explode the KV cache, and the 910B's weak memory bandwidth (~36% of H100) makes this acute。生态进展:混合/稀疏注意力已成开源主流(MiMo 的 SWA 6:1、DeepSeek-V4 CSA+HCA、openPangu DSA:SWA,Dispatch 04/05/07/20),novelty 相应下调;但『用这些架构在 NPU 上跑长上下文 RL 并量化 KV 压缩对 reasoning 的影响』仍是空白,且 Dispatch 17 的 500 轮/256k doc2repo 负载给了最尖锐的需求场景。
steps: Quantify KV-cache memory across a long-CoT GRPO rollout on Ascend
Use openPangu Flash 6B (MLA+DSA:SWA, 910B-native) as the base and add ChunkKV-style compression to rollouts
Measure max trainable context length and throughput gains
Check reasoning accuracy is preserved vs uncompressed baselines
items.minimumExperiment: Measure KV-cache memory across a long-CoT GRPO rollout on Ascend using openPangu Flash 6B + ChunkKV-style compression.
items.successMetric: Max trainable context length increased ≥2× at equal reasoning accuracy vs the uncompressed baseline.

items.title: Auto-Porting / Operator-Coverage Tool for RL Kernels on Ascend
items.pitch: Target the operator-coverage gap directly: build tooling that detects unsupported PyTorch ops in an RL training graph and either maps them to Ascend C kernels or flags fallbacks, focused on the RL-critical path (attention, sampling, logprob).
items.why: Only ~65% of PyTorch ops auto-convert, so kernel work is the durable moat。生态进展:openPangu 2.0 开源了昇腾训推算子(Dispatch 20),RL 关键路径上第一次有了官方参考实现可对照——覆盖缺口被部分填补,novelty 下调;工具的定位也随之升级:不再是从零猜实现,而是『扫描 RL 训练图 → 命中 openPangu/CANN 已有算子就映射,缺口才写 Ascend C』。A profiler + coverage report integrated with torch_npu helps every team.
steps: Trace a verl GRPO step and enumerate ops with no/slow Ascend support
Cross-reference the gap list against openPangu's released operators; map hits, prioritize true misses (fused attention, top-k/sampling, logprob gather)
Write or optimize Ascend C kernels for the top offenders; benchmark vs fallback
Package as a profiler + coverage report integrated with torch_npu
items.minimumExperiment: Trace one verl GRPO step on Ascend and emit a coverage report of unsupported/slow ops on the RL-critical path.
items.successMetric: Coverage report plus ≥1 hand-written Ascend C kernel for a top offender, benchmarked vs the fallback.

items.title: MindSpeed/Ascend Training Backend for rLLM
items.pitch: 给 rLLM(Agentica 的 agentic RL 框架)写第一个昇腾训练后端:它的 Episode⊃Trajectory⊃Step 三层抽象 + Model Gateway(捕 logprob)+ verl/tinker/fireworks 可插拔后端架构已经就位,唯独缺一个 MindSpeed-RL/Ascend 实现。写完它,DeepSWE 全套纯 RL 编码智能体配方就能原样落到 NPU。
items.why: Dispatch 22 拆解了 rLLM 的后端架构并明确指出其接口对昇腾的意义:可插拔后端意味着接入成本是『写一个 backend』而非『改整个框架』——缺的只是有人写。回报极高:一次接入即获得 DeepSWE/GRPO++ 的全部稳定化配方(compact filtering、去归一化、entropy-free),且 Model Gateway 的 logprob 捕获点正是 Dispatch 13 训推一致坑的天然监控探针。难度中等,因为 verl 后端可作模板。
steps: Read rLLM's verl backend as the reference implementation; enumerate the backend interface surface (train step, weight sync, logprob capture)
Implement the interface against MindSpeed-RL + vLLM-Ascend, wiring weight sync through the HCCL transfer backend
Reproduce a scaled-down DeepSWE run (Qwen3-8B on an R2E-Gym subset) on one 8×910B node
Compare reward curves vs the GPU verl backend; upstream the backend + a porting note to rLLM
items.minimumExperiment: Implement the minimal rLLM backend interface over MindSpeed-RL and run one GRPO++ training step on Ascend with logprob capture verified.
items.successMetric: A DeepSWE-style small-model run trains end-to-end on 8×910B through rLLM, with reward curve within noise of the GPU verl backend.

items.title: HCCL Weight Transfer × AReaL 2.0 Weight-Update Service: 昇腾异步权重同步链路端到端打通
items.pitch: 把上周两块拼图拼上:vLLM-Ascend v0.22.1rc1 的 HCCL 权重传输后端(训推权重同步摆脱 NCCL)× AReaL 2.0 把权重更新拆成独立微服务(当前走 CUDA IPC)。目标是昇腾上第一条生产形态的异步 RL 权重同步链路:训练服务 → HCCL → rollout 引擎,零 CUDA 依赖,带延迟/带宽/staleness 完整测量。
items.why: 这是典型的『地基刚好凑齐』时刻:两个组件各自上周刚发布/刚打通,还没有人把它们接在一起。Dispatch 19 把 slime 的移植缺口精确圈定在训练/推理/权重同步三点,Dispatch 23 把异步 rollout 列为已收敛的标准答案——权重同步是昇腾落后于该标准答案的最后一环,打通它同时解锁 AReaL、slime、prime-rl 式架构在 NPU 上的落地。窗口期短,先做先得。
steps: Benchmark the raw HCCL weight-transfer backend: latency/bandwidth for 7B and 32B weight pushes between NPU pods
Swap AReaL 2.0's weight-update microservice transport from CUDA IPC to the HCCL backend behind its service interface
Run an async GRPO loop (1.5–7B) with live weight updates; measure update latency vs rollout staleness
Publish the integration + numbers as an AReaL PR and a reference architecture note for slime/prime-rl-style stacks
items.minimumExperiment: Push 7B weights from a MindSpeed training process to a vLLM-Ascend rollout worker via the HCCL backend and verify the rollout serves the new weights.
items.successMetric: End-to-end async GRPO run on Ascend with in-loop weight updates; update latency and staleness quantified, zero CUDA/NCCL dependency.

items.title: openPangu 后训练代码 × LongCat 规模主张的交叉验证
items.pitch: 两份互补证据的交叉实验:openPangu 2.0 给了昇腾后训练的第一手代码(Dispatch 20),LongCat-2.0 给了国产芯片全周期训练闭环的规模主张但代码闭源(Dispatch 21)。用 openPangu 的开源后训练栈在 8×910B 上复现小规模 RL,逐项验证 Dispatch 13 四坑(sleep-mode 缺位/logprob 一致性/长 rollout/沙箱成本)的官方解法是否真的成立、能否外推。
items.why: Dispatch 21 的证据天平明确标注 LongCat『闭环待验』——社区目前只能选择信或不信。openPangu 的代码让『验』第一次可操作:它的统一 SFT→多专家 RL→on-policy 蒸馏管线(与 DeepSeek-V4 OPD / MiMo MOPD 第三家收敛,Dispatch 16/20)在小规模上跑通与否、四坑在官方代码里是怎么绕的,直接决定社区对国产芯片 RL 闭环主张的置信度。独立复现类工作 novelty 中等,但证据价值高。
steps: Stand up openPangu's post-training code on one 8×910B node with the Flash 6B model
Run the 统一 SFT → 专家 RL 管线 on a verifiable-reward domain (math); document how the code handles each of the four D13 pits
Attempt the on-policy distillation stage at small scale; record what breaks vs what the paper claims
Publish a reproduction report grading each LongCat-adjacent claim: verified / partially verified / unverifiable at small scale
items.minimumExperiment: Run openPangu's expert-RL stage on Flash 6B / GSM8K for 100 steps on one node and document how its code addresses the D13 four pits.
items.successMetric: A public reproduction report with per-claim verdicts and a working small-scale run of the openPangu post-training pipeline on 910B.

items.title: align-probe: 基于 openPangu 训推算子的逐算子数值对齐工具
items.pitch: 落地 Dispatch 13 悬置的 logprob 一致性坑:做一个逐算子数值对齐探针,以 openPangu 开源的昇腾训推算子为参考实现,对 RL 关键路径(fused attention、logprob gather、sampling、accumulation)逐算子比对训练侧 vs 推理侧 vs GPU 参考的数值语义,自动定位训推分歧的算子级根因。
items.why: 训推不一致是 RL-on-NPU 最阴险的坑:症状在 reward 曲线上,根因在算子里,目前只能靠人肉 bisect。Dispatch 20 指出 openPangu 开源后『算子数值语义第一次可观察』——这正是造对齐工具缺的那块参考基准;Dispatch 23 则把训推一致的根治层判定为昇腾缺位、短期靠监控+算法补偿——align-probe 就是那个监控层的具象化。与 GRPO benchmark idea 互补:那个量化宏观漂移,这个定位微观根因。
steps: Define the probe interface: capture per-op inputs/outputs on both training (MindSpeed) and inference (vLLM-Ascend) sides for the same token batch
Use openPangu's released 训推算子 as the reference semantics; build ULP-error / logprob-delta reports per operator
Validate on a known divergence case (npu_fusion_attention vs eager attention) to prove root-cause localization
Integrate as a pre-flight check for verl/MindSpeed-RL runs and publish the top-N divergent-operator table for 910B
items.minimumExperiment: Capture and diff per-operator logprob deltas between MindSpeed training and vLLM-Ascend inference for one Qwen2.5-0.5B forward pass.
items.successMetric: The probe localizes at least one real train-infer divergence to a specific operator, confirmed by a fix or workaround that shrinks logprob MAE.

items.title: DSA:SWA 配比消融:openPangu 1:2 vs MiMo 6:1 的长上下文对照实验
items.pitch: 两家用相似原料给出悬殊配方:openPangu 选 DSA:SWA 1:2(Dispatch 20),MiMo-V2.5 选 SWA×全局 6:1(Dispatch 07)。做一个受控消融:同一小模型骨架、同一数据,在昇腾上扫配比(1:2 / 3:1 / 6:1),测长上下文能力、KV 内存、910B 上的实际吞吐三条曲线,回答『混合注意力配比是 taste 还是 trade-off』。
items.why: 配比差 12 倍却都声称有效,说明设计空间没被系统探索过——这是典型的『大厂没空做、学界没硬件做』的空白,而且天然适合昇腾:配比直接决定 KV 内存与带宽压力,910B 的弱内存带宽(~36% of H100)会把配比差异放大成可测的吞吐差异,结论对 NPU 上的长上下文 RL 选型(接 Dispatch 17 的 256k 负载)有直接指导价值。小模型即可出结论,算力门槛低。
steps: Build a ~1B hybrid-attention skeleton with a configurable sparse:SWA interleave ratio
Pretrain-lite (or continue-pretrain) each ratio variant on identical long-context data on 8×910B
Evaluate needle-in-haystack / RULER-style long-context scores, KV memory, and rollout throughput per ratio
Publish the three-curve trade-off chart and a recommendation for NPU long-context RL configs
items.minimumExperiment: Continue-pretrain two ~1B variants (1:2 and 6:1) on identical long-context data and compare RULER-style scores + KV memory on one 910B node.
items.successMetric: A ratio-vs-capability/memory/throughput trade-off curve with ≥3 points, sufficient to justify or refute either published ratio.

items.title: doc2repo 长程 RL on Ascend:DeNovoSWE 环境极端负载压测
items.pitch: 把 RL-on-NPU 推到最深的水域:用 DeNovoSWE(4818 个 doc2repo 实例,自带单测/Docker 的 RLVR 环境,Dispatch 17)在昇腾上跑长程 agentic RL,直面 500 轮交互/256k 上下文的极端 rollout 负载——这是对 Dispatch 13 四坑中『长 rollout』与『沙箱成本』两坑的同时压测,也是昇腾显存痛点的最大化暴露。
items.why: Dispatch 17 明确指出 DeNovoSWE 是 for SFT & RL 且自带 RLVR 环境,但没有任何人(GPU 侧也没有)公开跑通过它的 RL 一侧——在昇腾上做等于同时开两个先例。Dispatch 08/23 都判断超长 agentic rollout 会把 NPU 显存与异步调度痛点放大到极致:这既是风险也是价值,压测产出的失效模式清单(KV 爆点、dispatcher 长尾、沙箱吞吐墙)会成为后续所有昇腾 agentic RL 工作的地图。难度最高,建议叠在 rLLM 后端与 HCCL 链路两个 idea 之上做。
steps: Stand up the DeNovoSWE eval harness + Docker sandboxes beside an 8×910B node; measure sandbox throughput ceiling first
SFT a Qwen3-8B-class model on the released 11k trajectories as the RL warm start
Run GRPO++ with compact filtering on a 50-instance subset, capping at 128 turns / 64k to establish a stable baseline
Progressively raise turns/context toward 500/256k; log the failure frontier (HBM, staleness, sandbox cost) at each step
Publish the failure-mode map + the largest stable config as the Ascend long-horizon RL reference point
items.minimumExperiment: Run GRPO++ on 50 DeNovoSWE instances at 128 turns / 64k context on one 8×910B node without divergence.
items.successMetric: A published failure-frontier map (turns × context × HBM) plus one stable long-horizon RL run exceeding 200 turns on Ascend.

items.title: 异构训推一致性基准:NPU 侧 R3 / 统一 FP8 等价物
items.pitch: 首创 Dispatch 23 圈定的空白:GPU 侧训推一致已有三层解法(监控 / 算法补偿 / 根治,根治层如 Miles 的 Rollout Routing Replay 逐比特对齐与统一 FP8),但全部假设同构硬件。做第一个『异构训推一致性』基准 + NPU 侧根治层原型:定义 MoE 路由回放与统一低精度在 CANN/HCCL 语义下的等价物,量化『NPU 训练 × NPU 推理』与『NPU 训练 × GPU 推理』两种组合的一致性上限。
items.why: Dispatch 23 的结论原文:训推一致的根治层在昇腾缺位,异构一致性是明确的开放战场;Dispatch 09 拆解过 R3 的逐比特对齐机制并点出其对昇腾 MoE RL 的启发,Dispatch 20 提示 openPangu 的 FP8 一致/路由回放仍待验——三条线索都指向同一个无人区。这是列表里唯一同时具备『定义新问题(基准)』和『给出新机制(NPU 等价物)』的 idea,学术与工程价值都拉满;依赖 align-probe 级别的数值基础设施,适合作为其后继。
steps: Formalize the consistency metrics (per-token logprob MAE, MoE routing-decision flip rate, reward drift) into a runnable benchmark harness
Baseline the two heterogeneous combos (NPU-train×NPU-infer, NPU-train×GPU-infer) on a small MoE with GRPO
Prototype an R3 equivalent on Ascend: record routing decisions at rollout, replay them exactly in the MindSpeed training forward
Prototype unified low-precision (FP8-path parity between vLLM-Ascend rollout and training GEMMs) on 950-class hardware
Release the benchmark + both prototypes; report how far each closes the heterogeneous consistency gap
items.minimumExperiment: Measure routing-decision flip rate and logprob MAE between vLLM-Ascend rollout and MindSpeed training forward on a small MoE for one GRPO batch.
items.successMetric: A public heterogeneous-consistency benchmark plus an NPU-side routing-replay prototype that measurably reduces flip rate toward zero.
